title: Beware of Pity
writer: Stefan Zweig, Elizabeth Baron, W.P. Lipscomb
actors: Lilli Palmer, Albert Lieven, Cedric Hardwicke
plot: A man asks a pretty young woman for a dance and discovers that she has been paralyzed in a fall from a horse and can't walk. Taking pity on her, he begins spending more and more time with her. They gradually become friends, and sh...
